description_long: This object is a stylized potted plant featuring broad, overlapping green leaves arranged in a rosette pattern, with a single tall stem rising from the center. Atop the stem is a prominent, geometric red flower with layered, pointed petals, giving it a striking and decorative appearance. The leaves are thick and slightly curved, radiating outward and upward, creating a lush, full look. The plant appears to be set in an invisible or minimal pot, as no container is visible at the base. The overall design is simple yet bold, with clean lines and a matte finish, making it suitable for modern urban environments. The color contrast between the green foliage and the red flower adds visual interest and makes the plant stand out as a decorative accent.
description: A stylized potted plant with broad green leaves and a prominent red geometric flower atop a central stem. The design is bold, clean, and visually striking, ideal for modern urban settings.
description_view_0: Front view shows the red flower clearly above the dense, layered green leaves, with the rightmost leaf extending outward.
description_view_1: This view highlights the symmetry of the leaves and the flower, with the left side leaves more visible and the flower's petals slightly angled.
description_view_2: The plant appears more compact from this angle, with the leaves overlapping tightly and the flower centered above.
description_view_3: This view emphasizes the broadness of the leaves and the full, lush appearance of the plant, with the flower directly above the central axis.
